name_en: [Coach Top] CH139 Teri Underarm Bag, Chambrel Series. Two shoulder straps. Luxurious and delicate fabric paired with the stylish and elegant Teri underarm bag, adding more vitality and youthful confidence. Versatile and casual, never out of style. Can be worn underarm or crossbody, very practical. Dimensions: 24*15*8
